title: Prodia's net profit corrected 17.5% at the end of September 2024
body: PT Prodia Widyahusada Tbk (PRDA), the company that oversees the Prodia laboratory network, is still experiencing a downward trend in net profit until September 2024.

title: VOKS will pay off two bonds worth IDR 350 billion
body: PT Voksel Electric Tbk (VOKS) will pay off two 2023 Shelf Registration Bonds worth a total of IDR 350 billion.

title: KAI to issue bonds and sukuk with a principal amount of IDR 2 trillion
body: PT Kereta Api Indonesia (Persero) or KAI will issue Shelf Registration Bonds II Phase I/2024 with a principal amount of IDR 1.5 trillion and Shelf Registration Sukuk Ijarah II Phase I/2024 with a principal amount of IDR 500 billion.

title: Trisula Textile Industries' net profit grows 5% in 9M 2024
body: PT Trisula Textile Industries Tbk (BELL), an issuer providing fabric and apparel, posted a net profit of IDR 12.82 billion in the first nine months (9M) of 2024.

title: Ending Q3 2024, SMGR’s profit down 58%
body: PT Semen Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (SMGR) reported a downturn in Q3 2024 compared to the same period last year.

title: Prodia's net profit corrected 17.5% at the end of September 2024
body: PT Prodia Widyahusada Tbk (PRDA), the company that oversees the Prodia laboratory network, is still experiencing a downward trend in net profit until September 2024.

title: VOKS will pay off two bonds worth IDR 350 billion
body: PT Voksel Electric Tbk (VOKS) will pay off two 2023 Shelf Registration Bonds worth a total of IDR 350 billion.

title: KAI to issue bonds and sukuk with a principal amount of IDR 2 trillion
body: PT Kereta Api Indonesia (Persero) or KAI will issue Shelf Registration Bonds II Phase I/2024 with a principal amount of IDR 1.5 trillion and Shelf Registration Sukuk Ijarah II Phase I/2024 with a principal amount of IDR 500 billion.

title: Trisula Textile Industries' net profit grows 5% in 9M 2024
body: PT Trisula Textile Industries Tbk (BELL), an issuer providing fabric and apparel, posted a net profit of IDR 12.82 billion in the first nine months (9M) of 2024.

title: Ending Q3 2024, SMGR’s profit down 58%
body: PT Semen Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (SMGR) reported a downturn in Q3 2024 compared to the same period last year.

title: WIFI’s net profit increased 3.4 times in 9M 2024
body: PT Solusi Sinergi Digital Tbk (WIFI), a digital company debuted in Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) in 2020, announced net profit of IDR 152.07 billion recorded within the first nine months (9M) of 2024.

title: Turning the tide, JAST finally collected IDR 218.7 million of profit in September 2024
body: PT Jasnita Telekomindo Tbk (JAST) managed to bring in net profit of IDR 218.7 million in the first nine months (9M) of 2024, turning the tide from the loss it faced in 9M 2023 of IDR 3.2 billion.

title: Take a look at top 10 stocks with exorbitant prices
body: Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) lists 10 top stocks with the highest prices in the stock market, according to the last closing price on Thursday (31/10).

title: Habco Trans Maritima obtains loan facility of IDR 540 billion from BCA
body: PT Habco Trans Maritima Tbk (HATM) has signed a credit agreement with PT Bank Central Asia Tbk (BBCA) or BCA with the limit set to IDR 540 billion.

title: MD Entertainment acquires 19% Net TV shares
body: On Tuesday, October 29, PT Net Visi Media Tbk (NETV), a holding company for mass media, attracted a new investor after welcoming Newton Capital the week before. A production company called PT MD Entertainment Tbk purchased over 7.88 billion NETV shares, or about 19.07% of the company. This fantastic transaction was facilitated by PT Samuel Sekuritas Indonesia.

title: CTRA secured IDR 1.27 trillion of profit until Q3 2024
body: PT Citra Development Tbk (CTRA), a housing developer, posted net profit of IDR 1.27 trillion until the third quarter (Q3) of 2024, up 8.12% year-on-year (yoy) from IDR 1.18 trillion in September (9M) 2023.

title: Foreign share transactions generate net foreign volume at -523.74 million shares
body: On Wednesday, October 30, foreign investors were seen purchasing and selling stocks, with a total of 2.60 billion shares purchased and 3.12 billion shares sold. As a result, net foreign volume closed at -523.74 million shares. The mineral mining business PT Bumi Resources Minerals Tbk (BRMS) had the most shares bought, with 263.45 million shares purchased for a net volume of 187.85 million shares.

title: PANI’s profit skyrocketed 91% as of September 2024
body: PT Pantai Indah Kapuk Dua Tbk (PANI), the developer of Pantai Indah Kapuk (PIK), booked net profit of 487 billion within the first nine months (9M) of 2024.

title: AVIA posted IDR 1.16 trillion of profit in Q3 2024
body: PT Avia Avian Tbk (AVIA), a paint manufacturer, booked net profit of IDR 1.16 trillion in Q3 2024, up from IDR 1.14 trillion seen in the same period in 2023.

title: CLEO profit soars 58.18% in third quarter
body: PT Sariguna Primatirta Tbk (CLEO), a bottled drinking water producer, posted profit growth of 58.18% in the third quarter of 2024 from the same period in 2023.

title: These are Top 10 Market Cap list in October
body: PT Bank Central Asia Tbk (BBCA) is at the top of the Top Market Capitalization (market cap) list in October 2024.

title: AGII profit declines 27% despite revenue increase
body: Even though PT Samator Indo Gas Tbk (AGII)'s revenue rose slightly by 2.85%, its profit fell by 27.03% in the third quarter of 2024 from the same period in 2023.

title: SMSM to distribute interim dividend of IDR 201.55 billion
body: PT Selamat Selamat Tbk (SMSM), an automotive component manufacturer, will distribute an interim dividend of IDR 201.55 billion or IDR 35 per share.

title: MTDL profit rose 13.34% in third quarter
body: PT Metrodata Electronics Tbk (MTDL) posted growth in revenue and profit performance in the first nine months of this year. Hardware sales remain the main contributor to this issuer's revenue.

title: Map Aktif Adiperkasa net profit grows 7.3% in 9M 2024
body: PT Map Aktif Adiperkasa Tbk (MAPA), a subsidiary of PT Mitra Adiperkasa Tbk (MAPI), posted a net profit of IDR 1.1 trillion in the first nine months (9M) of 2024.

title: Merdeka Battery Materials to issue 10% new shares via private placement
body: PT Merdeka Battery Materials Tbk (MBMA), a nickel mining issuer that supplies battery raw materials for electric vehicles, will carry out additional capital without providing pre-emptive rights (PMTHMETD) or private placement.

title: BNI credit grows 5.7% in Q3 2024, KPR segment skyrockets 13% above industry
body: PT Bank Negara Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (BBNI) or BNI recorded moderate credit growth at the end of September 2024, up 5.7% year-on-year (yoy). However, home ownership credit (KPR) was recorded to have soared higher than the industry average.

title: Encouraging Sustainability, BNI Focuses on Upgrading MSME Financing
body: PT Bank Negara Indonesia (Persero) Tbk or BNI pays serious attention to funding support and empowerment of micro, small and medium enterprises (MSMEs) as one of the pillars of sustainability in implementing the principles of Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG).

title: 10 issuers in Top Gainers list
body: The Indonesia Stock Exchange (BEI) recorded 10 Top Gainers issuers with share price growth in the range of 98%-284% during the month from August to September 2024.

title: Hosting NextGen Fest 2024, Prudential to expand young agent recruitment
body: Noticing great potential of younger generation in insurance industry, Prudential Indonesia held NextGen Fest 2024 in Senayan today (30/10).

title: Govt must be prudent regarding plans to save Sritex
body: The House of Representatives (DPR) reminded the Government to be prudent in its plan to save PT Sri Rejeki Isman Tbk (SRIL). This was conveyed by Misbakhun, Member of Commission XI DPR in Jakarta (30/10).

title: Six indices undergo major evaluations
body: Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) authorities have begun the major evaluations for six indices, effective from November 1, 2024 until January 31, 2025. It also evaluated 10 other indices in a minor scale.

title: Barito Pacific acquired 2.6 billion Chandra Asri Pacific (TPIA) shares
body: PT Barito Pacific Tbk purchased over 2.63 billion shares of PT Chandra Asri Pacific (TPIA) on Monday, October 28. The investor previously owned about 10.62% of this petrochemical company's shares; however, the most recent transaction through PT Bahana Sekuritas increased its share portion to 13.67%.

title: Facing consecutive losses post-IPO, Bukalapak.co to close down business lines
body: PT Bukalapak.com Tbk (BUKA), an e-commerce company debuted on Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) in 2021, will close down some of its business lines to restructure the company.

title: NET TV welcomes Newton Capital as new investor
body: On Friday, October 25, PT Net Visi Media Tbk (NETV), the mass media holding company, welcomed Newton Capital Ltd. as a new investor. With a 10.67% ownership stake, the investor purchased over 4.41 billion shares through PT Mandiri Sekuritas. This issuer owns NET TV, a national television network, and Creative Inc., a content production company.

title: Foreign transactions decrease, net foreign volume closed at -409.17 million shares
body: On Tuesday (29/10), share buying and selling transactions by foreign investors both decreased compared to the previous day, with foreign buying volume at 2.46 billion shares and foreign selling volume at 2.87 billion shares. As a result, net foreign volume ended at -409.17 million shares.

title: Returning to green zone, foreign net volume hit surplus at 143.63 million shares
body: In contrast to the previous day, net foreign volume on Monday, October 28, returned to the green zone, closing at 143.63 million shares. This was because the net foreign volume was 3.78 billion shares, whereas the foreign sales volume was 3.64 billion shares. The most shares purchased belonged to the digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO), namely around 1.54 billion shares, with a net volume of 255.51 million shares.

title: Production falls, DSNG net profit skyrockets 72%
body: Even though PT Dharma Satya Nusantara Tbk (DSNG)'s palm oil fresh fruit bunches (FFB) production decreased by 5.1% year-on-year (yoy), the company's revenue and net profit actually increased, supported by rising selling prices and falling fertilizer prices.

title: Take a look at 10 issuers with the highest number of shares
body: Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) lists 10 issuers with the highest number of shares in the stock exchange as of October 29, 2024

title: Yesterday’s SUN auction reported incoming bids of IDR 29.58 trillion
body: Total incoming bids reported in the last round of Government Securities (SUN) auction yesterday (29/10) hit IDR 29.58 trillion.
